title: nathar #5425
definition:
1) to start up, tremble, shake, spring up
    1a) (Qal) to start up
    1b) (Piel) to leap
    1c) (Hiphil) to cause to start up
 2) to loose, let loose, undo, be free, be loose
    2a) (Hiphil)
        2a1) to unfasten, loosen
        2a2) to set free, unbind
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to start up, tremble, shake, spring up
    1a) (Qal) to start up
    1b) (Piel) to leap
    1c) (Hiphil) to cause to start up
 2) to loose, let loose, undo, be free, be loose
    2a) (Hiphil)
        2a1) to unfasten, loosen
        2a2) to set free, unbind

    NASB:  to spring or start up
